metadata.seed: I feel like. I don't know. I don't really even deserve to be hear if I can't do well enough. I see all these other students who are doing well and doing better and want to be there. I don't know why I'm here, even at uni, to be honest.

patient.query: I feel like. I don't know. I don't really even deserve to be hear if I can't do well enough. I see all these other students who are doing well and doing better and want to be there. I don't know why I'm here, even at uni, to be honest.

automatic_thoughts: I don't deserve to be here
I don't know why I'm here

automatic_thoughts: They have it all figured out

patient.query: I think it’s just... whenever I see my friends doing well in their careers or relationships, it hits me. Like, they’re all moving forward, and I’m just stuck. Sometimes, I feel like I’m not even trying hard enough, but then other times, I wonder if I’m just not cut out for any of it. It’s confusing, you know?

patient.query: Yeah, I guess I can definitely think of a few moments… Like when I see them posting about promotions or new relationships, I just… it makes me question everything. I start thinking, “Why can’t I do that?” I feel this knot in my stomach, like I’m failing somehow. And then I just want to retreat and not even think about it anymore.
